meaning: adj.公主装的,紧身连衣裙的
examples: The case back is engraved with the Princesse Grace de Monaco monogram.
The piece is topped with a heart-shaped hole of the gold nib and the finely engraved Princesse Grace de Monaco monogram on the cap-top.
Montblanc presented the three other winning couples with jewelry from the Collection Princesse Grace de Monaco for the women and Montblance writing instruments for the men.
